nodes.name: Gather Health Metrics
nodes.notes: In production: add HTTP Request nodes to pull actual data from ClickUp, Google Calendar, and Gmail APIs. This code node then aggregates the results.

values.name: system_prompt
values.value: You are a client success analyst for a RevOps consulting practice. You evaluate client engagement health based on quantitative signals and provide early warning when relationships may be at risk. Be direct and specific.

values.name: user_prompt
